package rulecoverage

func NegativeServiceWritePassthroughWithoutDomainValidation() string {
    ruleID := "service_write_passthrough_without_domain_validation"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Write-style service methods that mostly forward to repositories without visible domain guard checks."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
